pages.title: About Will Forster - Will Forster MP
pages.meta_description: Will Forster is Woking's local champion
headings: h2: Liberal Democrat MP for Woking
pages.text_excerpt: About Will Forster - Will Forster MP Skip to main content Will Forster MP About Will Contact Will Will's Campaigns Volunteer News Woking Lib Dems Donate Join Donate Join Will's Campaigns Hilton & Sir Robert McAlpine International Affairs Housing & Welfare Vulnerable Children Council Finance Cost of living Healthcare, Social Care & the NHS Trains News Article Will Forster Liberal Democrat MP for Woking Will Forster is the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Woking. Before being elected as Woking’s MP, Will served as Deputy Leader of Woking Borough Council and a Borough Councillor for Hoe Valley, and also the Lib Dem Group Leader on Surrey County Council and the County Councillor for Woking South. Will grew up in Goldsworth Park and Horsell, where he attended local schools including Horsell Church of England Middle School, Woking High School and Woking College. Will lived in Westfield for many years and he now lives by Woking Park with his sausage dog Toffee. Will was first elected to serve his local community as a Councillor in 2009. Will was comfortably re-elected in the 2024 local elections and has the largest majority in Woking, a testament to his hard work for local residents. He was delighted to become Deputy Leader of Woking Borough Council following the elections in May 2022. As Deputy Leader, Will stopped the controversial Victoria Arch widening scheme, ensured vital voluntary groups like Citizens Advice Woking and Woking Community Transport received financial support and lead the consultation about the Sheerwater Regeneration. In 2018 to 2019, he was honoured to serve as the Mayor of Woking, during which time Will strongly supported the Borough's voluntary sector and raised tens of thousands of pounds for his Mayoral Charity, the York Road Project, which helps local homeless people. pages.title: Will's Campaigns - Will Forster MP
pages.meta_description: Will Forster is campaigning on the issues that matter to people in Woking
pages.text_excerpt: Will's Campaigns - Will Forster MP Skip to main content Will Forster MP About Will Contact Will Will's Campaigns Volunteer News Woking Lib Dems Donate Join Donate Join Will's Campaigns Hilton & Sir Robert McAlpine International Affairs Housing & Welfare Vulnerable Children Council Finance Cost of living Healthcare, Social Care & the NHS Trains News Article Will's Campaigns Will Forster is a campaigning MP, working hard on the issues that matter most to people here in Woking. No Doctors? No Development GP surgeries are now serving 30% more homes than they were just a decade ago - and yet developers are still being allowed to build without the infrastructure communities need. Too often, GP provision is promised with new developments but never delivered. Patients are left waiting longer, and local services are stretched beyond capacity. Every new development should include new or expanded GP surgeries, delivered when residents move in — not years later. The Liberal Democrats say: no doctors, no development. Sign my petition: No Doctors?
